zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary Davenport於1287年出生在英國英格蘭爾南特維其時，她的父親Henry Davenport31歲，母親Agnes de Macclesfield29歲。她於1315年與Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight在英國爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1361年在英國藍卡爾武普 霍蘭享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary Davenport于1287年出生在英国英格兰爾南特維其时，她的父亲Henry Davenport31岁，母亲Agnes de Macclesfield29岁。她于1315年与Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight在英国爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1361年在英国藍卡爾武普 霍蘭享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary Davenport was born in 1287, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Davenport, was 31 and her mother, Agnes de Macclesfield, was 29. She married Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight in 1315, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1361, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary Davenport est née en 1287, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Davenport, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Macclesfield, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight en 1315, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1361, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Davenport è nata il nel 1287 nel Nantwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry Davenport, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Macclesfield, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight nel 1315, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1361, nel Up Holland, Lancashire, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Davenportが1287年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで生まれた時，父Henry Davenportは31歳，母Agnes de Macclesfieldは29歳であった。1315年にイギリスチェシュアイアでSir William Mainwaring III , Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1361年にイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Davenport(이)가 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Davenport(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Macclesfield(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1315년 영국 체실르에서 Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 영국 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary Davenport родилась в 1287 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Davenport было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Macclesfield, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Mainwaring III , Knight в 1315 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1361 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.
